---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I always have to re-select my language filters every visit..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which area of the app does this affect?

- [ ] Search / Filtering
- [ ] Issue Result Cards
- [ ] Bookmarks / Favorites
- [ ] API / Data Sources
- [ ] UI / Design
- [ ] Deployment / Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## New GitLab Instance Request?

If you're requesting a new GitLab instance to be monitored, please include:
- **Instance base URL:** (e.g., `https://gitlab.example.org`)
- **Does it require authentication?**
- **Does it use a specific label for beginner issues?**

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like to but would need guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
